expansion_prompt: Break down the core infrastructure setup into distinct, parallelizable components. Focus on: 1. Kubernetes namespace and operator deployments (CloudNative-PG, Redis operator). 2. PostgreSQL cluster deployment and configuration. 3. Redis/Valkey cluster deployment and configuration. 4. S3/R2 bucket provisioning and credential generation. 5. Cloudflare Tunnel setup. 6. Creation and population of the 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap. Ensure subagents consider dependencies between these components (e.g., operators before instances, credentials before ConfigMap). Subagent types: Implementer, Tester, Reviewer.
reasoning: This task involves provisioning multiple critical infrastructure components (PostgreSQL, Redis, S3/R2, Cloudflare Tunnel) and their respective operators, requiring significant configuration and integration within Kubernetes. It's foundational architectural work with multiple distinct integration points, impacting all subsequent service deployments, hence a score of 8.
